description: Every 3rd request to each API surface returns 429 RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED (more aggressive than real GBP QPM limits so tests run fast). Tests retry/backoff logic across both location discovery AND review pagination. Two locations with 15 reviews total are included so the app must survive mid-pagination rate limit hits, not just the first call.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: Great rooftop views of Union Square. The espresso martini is the move. Can get crowded on Fridays but the line moves — worth the wait.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Sunrise brunch on the rooftop on Sunday was surreal. Views of the Bay Bridge from up here are stunning. The brunch cocktail menu was creative and strong.

reviewReply.comment: Omar, Sunday sunrise brunches are our secret gem! So glad you found it. Come back this weekend. ☀️

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: The drinks are excellent but pricey even by SF standards. Atmosphere is top-tier. Dress code enforcement was inconsistent — some people in and some turned away for similar outfits.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Private event booking was seamless. 40-person team dinner with a custom cocktail menu and it all ran perfectly. The events team communicated flawlessly throughout.

reviewReply.comment: Quincy, 40-person corporate events are our sweet spot! We'll clear the calendar for you again anytime. 🥂

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: The DJ on Friday nights is legitimately good. Top 40 but remixed in a way that doesn't feel generic. Rooftop + good music + good drinks = ideal Friday.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Waited 45 minutes for cocktails on a Saturday. Bar is clearly understaffed for the volume they allow in. The drinks were great when they arrived but the wait kills the vibe.

reviewReply.comment: Samir, bar pacing on peak Saturday is our biggest operational challenge and we hear it clearly. Adding two more bar positions from June. Thank you for the honest feedback.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Celebrated my 30th birthday here and the team made it special without me having to ask — confetti, sparklers on the bottle, staff singing. Magical evening.

reviewReply.comment: Happy 30th Tasha! We love being part of milestone birthdays. Here's to the next 30! 🎂🥂

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev001
200000002.comment: SoMa location is more of a proper nightclub than the Union Square one. DJ booth, dedicated dance floor section, and the lighting is incredible. 2am closing time is a gift.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev002
200000002.comment: The bottle service experience here is well-run. No waiting around for ice refills, host was attentive all night, and the premium spirits are legitimately premium.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev003
200000002.comment: Good atmosphere but the sound system was distorting at peak volume — noticeably bad for a premium venue. Drinks and service were excellent though.

reviewReply.comment: Wendy, the sound system feedback is noted — we actually just replaced the subwoofers, so please give us another chance and let us know if you notice the improvement.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev004
200000002.comment: Brought my entire visiting London crew here and they couldn't believe SF had something this good. Compared it favorably to Shoreditch venues. That's a huge compliment from Brits who know nightlife.

reviewReply.comment: Xavier, comparing us to Shoreditch is genuinely one of the best things anyone has said to us! Your London crew is welcome back anytime. 🇬🇧

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev005
200000002.comment: Great pre-club warm-up spot. Earlier in the evening (before 11pm) it has a more lounge-y feel which I preferred. Gets more intense as the night goes on — both options work depending on your mood.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev006
200000002.comment: Cover charge went up again without any notice on the website. This is the third time I've shown up expecting one price and paid another. Update your listings.

reviewReply.comment: Zack, you're absolutely right and we're sorry. Cover pricing now updates same-day on all platforms. That shouldn't have happened three times.

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev007
200000002.comment: The cocktail menu here changes monthly and it's always outstanding. The current 'SF Fog' cocktail with butterfly pea gin and yuzu is a masterpiece. Bartenders clearly have culinary-level skills.

reviewReply.comment: Aisha, our head bartender treats every cocktail menu like a seasonal restaurant menu. The SF Fog is her favourite creation this year! 🌁

200000002.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000002/reviews/rev008
200000002.comment: Best nightclub in SoMa by a wide margin. Consistent quality across every visit this year. The music programming takes real risks and they mostly pay off. Would love to see some live sets.
